name: D/K
description: Core D/K combats one of the most common vitamin deficiencies in US adults, Vitamin D. Vitamin D is essential for everyday health as it controls the expression of 2,000+ genes, with receptors on nearly every cell in the body. Core D/K features the most bioavailable and bioactive form of supplemental vitamin K2 and vitamin D on the market to support bone health, neurological function, and immune response. Vitamin D/K is the only direct Vitamin D supplement containing Ampli-D, a 3x faster and more effective form of vitamin D.1 Although most widely recognized for its role in bone and muscle health, a growing bank of scientific evidence shows that vitamin D has important benefits for immunity too; helping to support the immune response and reducing the risk of acute respiratory infections. Clinically proven to raise vitamin D levels three times faster and more effectively1,3, it unlocks the benefits of ‘the sunshine vitamin’ more rapidly. Vitamin D is accompanied by it’s biochemical partner, Vitamin K2, to balance out the increased calcium absorption and make sure it gets deposited in the bone vs.
